task: Audit losing trades and compute structural SL savings
local_output: Query losing trades, classify exit types, fetch candle data
opus_correction: 9/10 SL-killed trades saved by structural SL = 171.8 pips / $798.91. Root cause: stale 1.5x ATR multiplier + no EMA100 awareness. Fix: max(3x ATR, EMA100 + buffer).
opus_reasoning: Systematic approach: query DB -> classify exits -> fetch OANDA M15 candles -> compute dual SL levels (structural vs ATR floor) -> compare against original. Key insight: structural SL won 6/9 cases where EMA100 was far enough from entry.

task: Nightly learning sentry with condition effectiveness analysis
local_output: Analyze trades, compute metrics, evaluate conditions
opus_correction: finding_id NULL on 100% of trades is the critical blocker. price_zone/invalidation_level are best conditions (64.3% WR). S16+V4+S1 account for 74% of losses. EUR_AUD churning in dead markets (BB width 0.00144).
opus_reasoning: Cross-referenced watch_suggestions against trade outcomes to derive condition-level effectiveness metrics. Aggregated by setup_id to identify chronically negative setups. Scanned pair-level patterns to detect churning.

task: Daily scout performance report with pipeline analysis
local_output: Scout findings, trade matching, watch progress
opus_correction: Pipeline conversion 0% - all trades outside scout. snipe_created=0 on all 42 findings = broken pipeline. Phantom trade with entry_price=0 from missing cooldown. Fix: cooldown logic + snipe pipeline audit + BB width thresholds.
opus_reasoning: Matched scout findings against executed trades to compute conversion. Discovered snipe_created universally zero, indicating a systemic pipeline break rather than individual condition failures.
